{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Hollow King’s Mantle
| introduced = cradle-08-wintersteel
}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Eithan]]'s [[Hollow King’s Mantle]] resembles a sweeping cloak the size of the room.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27">''Wintersteel'', chapter 27</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Eithan]] swept the [[Blood Sage]]'s attack aside with the [[Hollow King’s Mantle]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
